name: SocialOomph
description:
SocialOomph’s specialized automation tools eliminate pesky tasks from social media managers’ to-do lists. With a range of features like post scheduling, keyword tracking, and evergreen content recycling, it’s a versatile workhorse for teams of all sizes. 

Key Features

  • Advanced scheduling features let users schedule posts and set up queues for automatic content recycling.
  • Keyword tracking capabilities allow users to monitor social media and blogs for relevant content, facilitating engagement and seamless brand mention tracking. 
  • Evergreen content recycling automatically recycles users’ evergreen content, keeping their social media feeds active without constant manual input.
  • The bulk uploading tool enables users to upload and schedule multiple posts at once, saving time and guaranteeing consistency across posts.
  • Collaboration capabilities let users assign roles and permissions to team members.

Usability

Designed with functionality and efficiency in mind, SocialOomph offers a straightforward user interface that prioritizes productivity. While its design may lean towards the utilitarian, its powerful automation tools are nothing to scoff at when it comes to implementing efficient workflows.

Platform Compatibility

  • X (Twitter)
  • Facebook
  • LinkedIn
  • Pinterest
  • Mastodon

SocialOomph Pricing

  • Free Plan: Basic functionality with limited features.
  • Professional Plan: Starting at $15/month, the professional plan offers more features and platform support.

Customer Support

Support for SocialOomph users is provided through a ticket-based system and an extensive FAQ section on their website. Despite the lack of live support options, the ticketing system is quite efficient and addresses user issues quickly and without fuss.

Power Users

  • Marketers and businesses looking to automate their social media activities, especially for content recycling and bulk posting.
  • Social media managers who need to track brand mentions or relevant keywords across platforms for effective engagement.
  • Teams that need a straightforward tool with collaborative scheduling features.

Additional Features on SocialOomph

  • With email integration, some plans allow you to publish blog posts via email, adding flexibility to content creation workflows.
  • Self-destructing posts are a useful tool for publishing time-sensitive content like special offers.
  • Integrated URL shortening services give posts a cleaner look without bulky links.

SocialOomph is a powerful ally when it comes to streamlining social media management processes, empowering users to focus more on strategy and engagement rather than the manual labor of posting.

‍
